Cookie Policy

Our website uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience. Cookies are small files stored on your device that help us remember preferences and analyze how our site is used. Here’s how we use them:

  • Essential Cookies: Required for basic site functionality (e.g., page navigation, security). These cookies enable core features like form submissions and do not collect personal data.
  • Analytics Cookies: We use Google Analytics to understand site traffic and user behavior (e.g., which pages are most popular). This helps us optimize content. Analytics cookies collect anonymous usage data and do not identify you personally.
  • Advertising Cookies: If you see ads on our site (delivered by Google AdSense or other networks), cookies may track which ads are shown to improve targeting. We do not use these cookies to collect personal data.

You can control cookies via your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to decline non-essential cookies or receive a warning before one is placed. Be aware that disabling certain cookies may impact site functionality (for example, analytics will be less accurate).

For more information about Google’s use of data, you can visit Google’s Privacy Policy. By using our site, you consent to the placement of these cookies.
